sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tan (id UInt32, value Float32);
INSERT INTO test_tan (id, value) VALUES (1, tan(0)), (2, tan(1.57));
UPDATE test_tan SET value = tan(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tan(value) AS tangent FROM test_tan WHERE value > 0;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_tan WHERE tan(value) < 10;
